issue_summary: Make IndexWriterConfig setters throw an exception when passed null if null is not a valid value.
javadoc_before:
/** * Expert: sets the merge scheduler used by this writer. The default is * {@link ConcurrentMergeScheduler}. *

* NOTE: the merge scheduler cannot be null. If null is * passed, the merge scheduler will be set to the default. * *

Only takes effect when IndexWriter is first created. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Expert: sets the merge scheduler used by this writer. The default is * {@link ConcurrentMergeScheduler}. *

* NOTE: the merge scheduler cannot be null. * *

Only takes effect when IndexWriter is first created. */
